videos.title: Highlights from Finlandia Ski Marathon Classic 2026
videos.description:
Highlights from Finlandia Ski Marathon Classic 2026

The Ski Classics Challengers event, Finlandia Ski Marathon Classic, took place last Saturday (07.02.2026) with a 42km long-distance ski race in classic technique in Lahti, Finland. Watch the highlights here!

Video: Finlandia-hiihto

videos.title: Unusual Cross Country ski race - Red Bull Bieg Zbójników 2014
videos.description:
Visit http://win.gs/MqRAii for more ski racing!
Red Bull Bieg Zbójników is an unusual cross country ski race in Poland. Racers climb steep pitches and traverse technical lines to be the first to the top of the hill.
